hooks.command: IN=$(cat); f=$(printf '%s' "$IN" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null) || f=$(printf '%s' "$IN" | python3 -c "import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path') or '')" 2>/dev/null) || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"artifact/spec guard cannot parse tool input (jq and python3 unavailable) - protection is inert; install jq."}}'; exit 0; }; case "$f" in *.bin|*.pmtiles|*.pmtiles.png|*app/public/data/*.json) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Pipeline outputs (*.bin, *.pmtiles, *.pmtiles.png, app/public/data/*.json) are generated artifacts - regenerate via npm --prefix pipeline run polars|harbors|mask, never hand-edit."}}' ;; *docs/superpowers/specs/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"docs/superpowers/specs/ is the user-approved source of truth - CLAUDE.md forbids silently deviating from it. Confirm the user wants the spec itself changed before editing."}}' ;; esac

IN=$(cat); CMD=$(printf '%s' "$IN" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep\ *|rg\ *|*\ rg\ *|find\ *|*\ find\ *|fd\ *|*\ fd\ *|ack\ *|*\ ack\ *|ag\ *|*\ ag\ *) if [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then if [ -f graphify-out/.update-failed ]; then SID=$(printf '%s' "$IN" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id') or 'nosess')" 2>/dev/null || echo nosess); SENT="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/claude-graphify-stale-$SID"; if [ ! -e "$SENT" ]; then : > "$SENT" 2>/dev/null || true; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify graph exists but its last auto-update FAILED (see graphify-out/.update-failed) - it may be STALE (shown once per session). Prefer raw files/grep until `graphify update .` succeeds."}}'; fi; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: graphify-out/graph.json exists. You MUST run `graphify query \"<question>\"` before grepping raw files. Only grep after graphify has oriented you, or to modify/debug specific lines."}}'; fi; fi ;; esac

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); FIX="app/public/test-fixtures/wind-sw12.json"; case "$CMD" in *git\ commit*|*git\ -C*commit*|*git\ -c*commit*) [ -n "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain -- "$FIX")" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"wind-sw12.json has uncommitted changes (git commit -a would include them). pree2e regenerates this fixture with fresh timestamps - CLAUDE.md says restore it, not commit it (git restore app/public/test-fixtures/wind-sw12.json). Proceed only if the fixture change is intentional (generator changed)."}}' ;; *git\ add*) [ -n "$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain -- "$FIX")" ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"wind-sw12.json is dirty - expected pree2e churn per CLAUDE.md. Restore with: git restore app/public/test-fixtures/wind-sw12.json instead of staging it, unless the change is intentional."}}' ;; esac; exit 0

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); p="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app/node_modules/.bin/prettier"; case "$f" in *package-lock.json) ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.css|*.json) if [ -x "$p" ]; then out=$("$p" --write "$f" 2>&1) || { fs=$(printf '%s' "$f" | tr '\"' "'"); msg=$(printf '%s' "$out" | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | tr '\"' "'"); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"prettier failed on %s (file may not parse): %s"}}' "$fs" "$msg"; }; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"prettier hook inert: app/node_modules/.bin/prettier missing - run npm --prefix app install."}}'; fi ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *app/src/i18n/dict.*.ts) [ -x "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app/node_modules/.bin/tsc" ] || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"i18n key-parity guard SKIPPED: app/node_modules is missing tsc - run npm --prefix app install, then verify dict.de.ts/dict.en.ts key parity manually (typecheck)."}}'; exit 0; }; out=$(npm --prefix "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app" run typecheck 2>&1) || { echo 'typecheck failed after i18n dict edit. If errors point at dict.*.ts: key parity (satisfies Record<MsgKey,string>) - add every key to BOTH dict.de.ts and dict.en.ts. If errors are elsewhere: pre-existing, do not fix them by editing the dicts:' >&2; echo "$out" | tail -30 >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); e="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app/node_modules/.bin/eslint"; case "$f" in *app/src/*.ts|*app/src/*.tsx) if [ -x "$e" ]; then out=$(cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/app" && node_modules/.bin/eslint "$f" 2>&1) || { fs=$(printf '%s' "$f" | tr -d '\\' | tr '"' "'"); msg=$(printf '%s' "$out" | grep -E 'error|warning' | head -8 | tr '\n' ' ' | tr -d '\\' | tr '"' "'"); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"eslint flagged %s (CI runs lint BEFORE tests and fails on unused imports/type errors - fix now, do not wait for CI): %s"}}' "$fs" "$msg"; }; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"eslint hook inert: app/node_modules/.bin/eslint missing - run npm --prefix app install."}}'; fi ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *app/package.json|*app/package-lock.json) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Dependency manifest changed. Regenerate third-party notices: npm --prefix app run notices - CI fails on any drift in app/public/THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.txt (ci.yml runs git diff --exit-code). Do it now to avoid a ~10-min CI round-trip."}}' ;; esac

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *npm*install*|*npm*uninstall*|*npm*update*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"npm changed dependencies. Regenerate third-party notices: npm --prefix app run notices - CI fails on any drift in app/public/THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.txt. Run it before committing."}}' ;; esac

command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/graph.json" ] && { out=$(graphify update "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>&1) && rm -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/.update-failed" || printf '%s\n' "$out" > "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/.update-failed"; [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/graphify-out/.update-failed" ] && echo '{"systemMessage":"graphify update FAILED - knowledge graph may be stale (details: graphify-out/.update-failed)"}'; }; exit 0
